feat.name: Embrace the Pain
feat.text: Ignoring your pain, you reach out and grab the creature or weapon that caused you harm. Attempt an Athletics check to Grapple the triggering creature or to Disarm the creature of the weapon it damaged you with.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Rage
traits.text: You must be raging to use abilities with the rage trait, and they end automatically when you stop raging.

feat.trigger: A creature within your reach damages you with a melee attack.
